LanguageData.Mechanitor.scenario.parts.GameStartDialo:
People failed you long before machines ever did. So you put your faith in RobCo steel, old-world code, and the quiet certainty of tools that obey.
You arrive in the wasteland as a RobCo mechanic with a handful of loyal service bots and a chance to build something cleaner than the world that came before. Keep the machines running, and they might keep you alive.
